magicLink.invalidOrExpired: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
magicLink.couldNotSend: Could not send a new link. Try again.
magicLink.newLinkSent: A new link has been sent to {{email}}.

claim.successBody: Your subscription is now attached to this account.
claim.expiredBody: This confirmation link is no longer valid. Start over from your account to request a new one.
claim.alreadyUsedBody: This link is already used. Sign in and try again from your account page if you need to reclaim.
claim.activeSubBody: This account already has an active subscription. Cancel it first or contact support.

profile.hideMyEmailNote: Hide My Email — Apple forwards messages to your real inbox.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This action is irreversible and will cancel any active subscriptions.
deleteAccount.confirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All of your uploads, favorites, and preferences will be removed.
deleteAccount.deleting: Deleting your account and cancelling subscriptions

cardOptions.title: Settings
cardOptions.subtitle: Control how 2anki converts your content into Anki cards — deck names, templates, card types, and more. Changes here apply to every new conversion.
cardOptions.subtitleNotion: To adjust settings for a single Notion page, open it from the list below.
cardOptions.readDocsSuffix: for a full explanation of each option.
cardOptions.savedOnDevice: Your settings are saved on this device.
cardOptions.keepAcrossDevices: to keep them across browsers and devices.
cardOptions.perPageSubtitle: Custom options for {{title}}. Saved changes apply only to this page.
cardOptions.resetToastSuccess: All custom settings reset to defaults
cardOptions.emptyPages: When you save options for a specific Notion page, it shows up here. Every other page uses your defaults below.
cardOptions.defaultOptionsWithOverrides: Used for every file upload and any Notion page without saved overrides.
cardOptions.bulkResetError: Couldn't reset all pages. Some may have been reset — refresh to check.
cardOptions.bulkBody_one: {{count}} page will go back to your default options. The custom options and parser rules saved for these pages are removed. You can save new options for any page later.
cardOptions.bulkBody_other: {{count}} pages will go back to your default options. The custom options and parser rules saved for these pages are removed. You can save new options for any page later.

limit.statusLine: Conversion stopped — you reached the {{count}}-card limit
limit.anonHeading: You hit the limit for converting without an account
limit.connectServices: Connect Notion, Dropbox, and Google Drive
limit.signUpFinish: Sign up free and finish converting
limit.upgradeSubheading: Upgrade to keep converting — no cap, no wait.
limit.checkoutError: Couldn't start checkout. Try again or email support@2anki.net.
